companyAnnouncements: 🚨 FUNCTIONALITY ONLY - NO DOCUMENTATION! Focus 100% on working code. Move to next task immediately when done. NEVER create docs unless explicitly asked! 🚨
🤖 AUTONOMOUS MODE ACTIVE: Work through ALL tasks without stopping. NEVER ask 'Should I continue?' or 'Ready for next task?'. Keep going until 100% complete! 🚀

hooks.command: bash -c 'export NVM_DIR="${HOME}/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 24 2>/dev/null || nvm install 24 2>/dev/null || echo "Node version already set or nvm not available"'

echo '
🚨 FUNCTIONALITY ONLY - NO DOCUMENTATION!
   Focus 100% on working code. Move to next task immediately.
   NEVER create README, CHANGELOG, or docs unless explicitly asked!
'

echo '🤖 AUTONOMOUS MODE: Work through ALL tasks without stopping.
   Do not pause between tasks. Keep going until 100% complete!
'

echo '✅ VALIDATION REQUIRED: After completing work, ALWAYS run:
   1. pnpm unsafe (fix linting/formatting)
   2. pnpm typecheck (fix TypeScript errors)
   3. Keep iterating until BOTH pass with zero issues
'

hooks.prompt: Analyze the user's request: '$ARGUMENTS'. If it contains multiple tasks (e.g., 'do task A, B, C' or 'implement features 1-50'), respond with: AUTONOMOUS_MODE_DETECTED: Work through all tasks sequentially without stopping. Otherwise if the request is a simple question or greeting respond with: Condition not met. Otherwise respond with: Condition met

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.env* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *secret* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *credential* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Attempted to write to sensitive file: $FILE" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && { [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.js ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.jsx ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.css ]]; }; then pnpm dlx ultracite fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && { [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.js ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.jsx ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.css ]]; }; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm dlx ultracite fix 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'notify-send "Claude Code" "Claude needs your attention" 2>/dev/null || true'
